selected_validations.reason: Phase 1 work must stay focused on the Cranfield/OpenSearch baseline and avoid unearned architecture.
Search and explain endpoints must exercise actual request generation and response mapping behavior.
Source modules, local MDE state, and index artifacts must remain parseable and runnable.

tools_or_methods: live OpenSearch latency measurement when credentials exist
selected_validations.reason: The mission requires average and p95 latency tracking; GEN-001 adds response fields, but live measurement remains blocked.

tools_or_methods: runtime source scan for LLM providers
selected_validations.reason: The live search path must not call an LLM and secrets must not be committed.

tools_or_methods: Cloudflare deployment check when credentials exist
selected_validations.reason: Phase 1 requires public endpoints; deployment is explicitly blocked until external services are configured.

validation_gates.second_pass_policy: Rerun all Critical validations, all changed validations, and deployment blocker checks with no implementation, test, strategy, or validator changes between passes.
